metadata.title: HackHub | Hackathon Manager
metadata.description: From registration to the final pitch — manage teams, schedules, submissions, and evaluations on a single platform for organizers and participants.

hero.subtitle: From registration to the final pitch — teams, schedule, submissions, and evaluations on one platform for organizers and participants.

features.label: features
features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: From planning to awards — a complete stack to run in-person, remote, or hybrid hackathons.

teams.title: Team and squad management
teams.description: Form squads, assign leaders, and track each team's composition in real time during the event.

submission.title: Submission and evaluation
submission.description: Receive solutions with repo, demo, and pitch. Judges evaluate with configurable criteria.

schedule.title: Live schedule
schedule.description: Publish event milestones — opening, checkpoints, final pitch — and keep everyone in sync.

dashboard.title: Organizer dashboard
dashboard.description: Centralized view of registrations, squads, submissions, and hackathon status in one place.

registration.title: Participant registration
registration.description: Signup flow, seat confirmation, and role-based access — organizer or participant.

mentorship.title: Mentorship and communication
mentorship.description: Channel questions, announcements, and mentoring without scattered WhatsApp or Slack groups.

organizers.title: Create and manage
organizers.description: Companies, universities, and tech communities use HackHub to set up events from scratch — registrations, squads, schedule, and judges in minutes.

participants.title: Find and join
participants.description: Developers and designers join the ecosystem, form squads, deliver solutions, and follow the hackathon on the platform.

pricing.label: pricing
pricing.title: Scale at your pace
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when your hackathon grows.

free.name: Free
free.description: For small events and communities getting started.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For recurring hackathons with more teams and judges.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For corporations and universities with custom needs.

free.content: Yes. The Free plan lets you run small events with up to 5 squads at no cost. Pro and Enterprise plans will launch soon for larger events.

teams.trigger: How many teams can I have per event?
teams.content: On the Free plan, up to 5 squads per event. On Pro, up to 50 squads. On Enterprise, unlimited squads with custom settings.

remote.trigger: Does it work for remote hackathons?
remote.content: Yes. HackHub supports in-person, remote, and hybrid events. Participants and organizers access everything on the web, from anywhere.

evaluation.content: Organizers set criteria and weights. Judges evaluate each submission on the platform. Rankings are calculated automatically from scores.

roles.trigger: What's the difference between organizer and participant?
roles.content: Organizers create events, manage squads, schedule, and judges. Participants sign up, join squads, and submit solutions.

launch.content: We're in early access. Join the waitlist to be notified when the beta is available.

waitlist.label: early access
waitlist.title: Be the first
waitlist.subtitle: Join the waitlist and get early access to HackHub when we launch the beta.
waitlist.success: ✓ You're on the list! We'll be in touch soon.

footer.description: The hackathon manager for organizers and participants. From registration to pitch — no spreadsheets, no chaos.
